  1. Description
  2. Nested Class Summary

Interface HandlerResult<M,E>

Type Parameters:
M - the message type
E - the envelope type
All Known Implementing Classes:
HandlerResult.AwaitingManualResponse, HandlerResult.ImmediateResponse, HandlerResult.NoResponseNeeded, HandlerResult.ProcessingError
public sealed interface HandlerResult<M,E> permits HandlerResult.ImmediateResponse<M,E>, HandlerResult.AwaitingManualResponse<M,E>, HandlerResult.NoResponseNeeded<M,E>, HandlerResult.ProcessingError<M,E>
Sealed interface representing the result of GTNet message processing. Each handler returns one of four possible outcomes:
  • HandlerResult.ImmediateResponse: Send response immediately to the caller
  • HandlerResult.AwaitingManualResponse: Message stored, awaiting admin action
  • HandlerResult.NoResponseNeeded: Processing complete, no reply required
  • HandlerResult.ProcessingError: Processing failed with error details

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    static final record 
    HandlerResult.AwaitingManualResponse<M,E>
    Result indicating the message was stored and awaits manual admin action.
    static final record 
    HandlerResult.ImmediateResponse<M,E>
    Result indicating an immediate response should be sent back to the caller.
    static final record 
    HandlerResult.NoResponseNeeded<M,E>
    Result indicating processing completed successfully with no response needed.
    static final record 
    HandlerResult.ProcessingError<M,E>
    Result indicating message processing failed with an error.
